AppFunctionAppMetadata.appfn:description:
Beautiful Quran provides hands-free Quran recitation, reader navigation, search, bookmarks, and reader preferences.
Operational Patterns: - Chapter and verse parameters work across the complete Quran; an omitted verse means verse 1. - Playback transport, speed, repeat ranges, and reciter selection operate without opening an in-app voice surface. - Foreground functions navigate the visible paper stack and resolve 'this verse' from the reader's current focus. - Reader preference updates preserve every omitted setting.
Constraints: - Chapters are numbered 1 through 114. - Verse numbers must exist within the selected chapter. - Foreground navigation and context-dependent bookmarking are available only while the activity is visible.
